name: Hook
desc: Boss (self-proclaimed) of an Underworld adventure squad, The Moles.\nShe loves freedom and sees life as a series of adventures.

1.name: Early to Bed, Early to Rise

2.name: Happy Tummy, Happy Body
2.desc: Extends the duration of Burn caused by Skill by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Don't Be Picky, Nothing's Icky
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: It's Okay to Not Know
4.desc: When Talent is triggered, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Burn enemies adjacent to the designated enemy target, equivalent to that of Skill.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

5.name: Let the Moles' Deeds Be Known
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Always Ready to Punch and Kick
6.desc: Hook deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to enemies afflicted with Burn.

110901.name: Hehe! Don't Get Burned!
110901.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy.
110901.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

110902.name: Hey! Remember Hook?
110902.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy. In addition, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Burn for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhen afflicted with Burn, enemies will take Fire DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
110902.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy, with a high chance to inflict Burn on the enemy.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110903.name: Boom! <unbreak>Here Comes the Fire!</unbreak>
110903.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy.\nAfter using Ultimate, the next Skill to be used is Enhanced, which deals DMG to one designated enemy and enemies adjacent to it.
110903.simple_desc: Deals massive Fire DMG to one enemy and <color=#f29e38ff>Enhances this unit's next Skill</color>.

110904.name: Ha! Oil to the Flames!
110904.desc: When attacking a target afflicted with Burn, deals Fire <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK and regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> extra Energy.
110904.simple_desc: When attacking a Burned enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>deals Fire <u>Additional DMG</u> for a moderate amount</color>, and additionally regenerates energy.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

110906.name: Attack
110906.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110907.name: Ack! Look at This Mess!
110907.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Hook deals Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of her ATK to a random enemy. In addition, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Burn on every enemy for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhen afflicted with Burn, enemies will take Fire DoT equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Hook's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
110907.simple_desc: Attacks enemies. After entering battle, deals minor Fire DMG to one random enemy, with a high chance to inflict Burn on each enemy.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110909.name: Hey! Remember Hook?
110909.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK to one designated enemy, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Burn them for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Additionally, deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.\nWhen afflicted with Burn, enemies will take Fire DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hook's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
110909.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy with a high chance of inflicting Burn, also deals minor Fire DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: Hook restores HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of her Max HP whenever her Talent is triggered.
Increases the chance to resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1.point_desc: After using her Ultimate, Hook has her <u>action advanced</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> and additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.
